name: stratosort
description: Stratosort - Local AI Document Organizer with Ollama integration. Privacy-focused document organization using AI-powered analysis.

scripts.build:dll: echo 'DLL build not required for current setup'
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.package: rimraf dist && npm run build && electron-builder build --publish never
scripts.electron: npm run build:dev && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron . --enable-logging
scripts.start:dev: npm run build:dev && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron . --enable-logging
scripts.test:functionality:
node -e "console.log('🧪 Stratosort Comprehensive Test Suite'); console.log('=' .repeat(50)); console.log('
📋 Available Test Commands:'); console.log('   npm run test:run        - Run all tests with reporting'); console.log('   npm run test:full       - Full test suite with coverage'); console.log('   npm run test:quick      - Quick test run (stop on first failure)'); console.log('   npm run test:upload     - Test file upload functionality'); console.log('   npm run test:ai         - Test AI processing pipeline'); console.log('   npm run test:performance - Test performance & resources'); console.log('
🔍 Test Coverage:'); console.log('   • File upload & validation (drag-drop, size limits)'); console.log('   • Ollama AI integration (document analysis, categorization)'); console.log('   • Document lifecycle (state management, concurrency)'); console.log('   • UI behavior (progress tracking, empty states)'); console.log('   • Configuration (custom settings, folder naming)'); console.log('   • Error handling (corrupted files, network issues)'); console.log('   • Performance (memory usage, processing speed)'); console.log('
🚀 Quick Start:'); console.log('   npm run test:run'); console.log('
✅ Expected Results:'); console.log('   • 95%+ test pass rate'); console.log('   • Detailed HTML/JSON reports'); console.log('   • Performance metrics'); console.log('   • Error diagnostics');"
scripts.dist: npm run build && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:win: set NODE_ENV=production && npm run build && npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npx electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:all: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --win --linux --config electron-builder.json
scripts.help:
node -e "console.log('🎯 STRATOSORT - NPM COMMANDS'); console.log('=' .repeat(30)); console.log('
🚀 Starting the App:'); console.log('   npm start          - Full startup check + launch'); console.log('   npm run start:quick - Quick launch (no checks)'); console.log('   npm run start:dev   - Development mode with logging'); console.log('   npm run start:debug - Debug mode with inspector'); console.log('
🤖 Ollama AI Management:'); console.log('   npm run setup:ollama  - Complete Ollama setup'); console.log('   npm run check:ollama  - Check Ollama status'); console.log('   npm run start:ollama  - Start Ollama service'); console.log('   npm run ollama:models - Install required models'); console.log('
🧪 Testing:'); console.log('   npm run test:functionality - View test guide'); console.log('   npm run verify             - Run verification'); console.log('
⚙️  Development:'); console.log('   npm run start:legacy - Legacy webpack mode'); console.log('   npm run build        - Build for production'); console.log('   npm run package      - Create distributable'); console.log('
📦 Distribution:'); console.log('   npm run dist         - Build installer for current platform'); console.log('   npm run dist:win     - Build Windows installer (.exe, .msi)'); console.log('   npm run dist:mac     - Build macOS installer (.dmg)'); console.log('   npm run dist:linux   - Build Linux installer (.AppImage, .deb)'); console.log('   npm run dist:all     - Build for all platforms'); console.log('
💡 Tips:'); console.log('   • Install Ollama: https://ollama.ai'); console.log('   • Install models: ollama pull gemma3:4b'); console.log('   • Start Ollama: ollama serve'); console.log('   • App works without Ollama (mock mode)');"
